calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Clifford Y. Wang, Esq., appearing for Petitioners. Wen Llie Yu and Wanning Huang father and mother of minors present in court.
Petitioners Sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter attorney Clifford Y. Wang.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Chaoquan Yu to Eric Chaoquan Yu; and Chaofeng Yu to David Chaofeng Yu.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
